atlassian.description: Connects to Atlassian cloud over HTTP. Gives agents access to Jira projects, issues, and Confluence pages — used by planner to pull ticket context and by swe to link implementations back to tickets.

serena.description: Launches Serena via uvx for symbol-aware code navigation — find definitions, references, and call graphs without scanning every file. The claude-code context disables tools already covered by Claude Code built-ins.
